---
title: "QuantumCircuit"
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=@."]
---

# QuantumCircuit

```{julia}
using PythonCall
```

```{python}
from qiskit import QuantumCircuit
circ = QuantumCircuit(1, 1)
circ.measure([0], [0]) # 0 classical register records 0 qubits.
circ.draw()
```

```{python}
from qiskit import QuantumCircuit
circ = QuantumCircuit(2, 2)
circ.measure([0], [0])
circ.draw()
```
